race.comment: TRAFALGAR SQUARE (10) switched to the Munce camp at the start of this prep and has been excellent. Scored first-up over 1200m at Ipswich then gave away too much start but got up for third over today's journey last time, again at Ipswich. Draws a touch closer and on that form she looks the one they have to beat. The widely travelled HELLOVA NATURE (5) returns to Queensland after a barnstorming second in a 1300m Rosehill Midway a fortnight ago. A tricky draw doesn't help the cause but he is racing too well to rule out. LARRIKIN ROGUE (1) has been freshened up since failing over the mile here seven weeks ago. Easy recent trial winner whose best form is certainly good enough. It is a huge leap for OCTOBER MANIFESTO (16) today off the back of a Beaudesert maiden win last time out. Progressive three-year-old who cannot be underestimated with just 52kgs.
